## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main` with a descriptive, prefixed branch name
- [ ] Commit subjects are imperative, no trailing period
- [ ] Updated the README (env-var table / sections) for any new config or surface

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private code committed
